injuries.description: Lumbar spine issues, herniated disc, or lower back strain

injuries.name: Knee Injury

injuries.name: General Spine Injury
injuries.description: General spinal issues or vertebrae problems

injuries.name: Hamstring Injury

injuries.name: Hip Flexor Strain
injuries.description: Iliopsoas or rectus femoris strain or overuse from repetitive hip flexion loading

injuries.name: Osteoporosis
injuries.description: Reduced bone density requiring avoidance of high-impact loading and extreme spinal flexion
